title: Lifetime mismatch
explanation: This error occurs when the lifetimes in your function signature do not match how the references are actually used. The compiler detects that the lifetime constraints you declared are inconsistent with the function body.
error_message: error[E0621]: explicit lifetime required in the type of `y`

fixes.description: Use the same lifetime for related references

tip: The syntax 'b: 'a means 'b outlives 'a. If your function might return either reference, both must share or be bounded by the return lifetime.
